title: T-005 — UI: FIN-017 Finance Settings page (fin_settings prototype) (§8.4 FIN-017)
prompt:
# T-005 — FIN-017 Finance Settings page UI

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §8.4 FIN-017 [UNIVERSAL]; §6.1 row 1 (finance_settings); §14.1 L2 per-tenant variations; §5.3 21 CFR Part 11 (critical_approval_pin_required).
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/other-screens.jsx:362-458 (`fin_settings`)

## Goal
Server Component page `/finance/settings` rendering 6 collapsible Card sections (General, Standard Cost Policy, Variance Display Thresholds, Overhead Allocation, Fiscal Calendar, D365 Integration) matching the `fin_settings` prototype 1:1, with sticky unsaved-changes bar, Save / Reset CTAs, and the embedded "Manage Cost Centers" + "Lock Period (Phase 2)" links.

## Prototype parity
Reference: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/other-screens.jsx:362-458`
Depends_on_prototypes from index: `period_lock_modal` (P2 stub, render disabled with `Badge variant='secondary' label='Phase 2'`).
shadcn primitives required: Card, CardHeader, CardContent, Form, FormField, RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem, Select, SelectItem, Input, Checkbox, Button, Alert, Badge.
Parity checklist (all must match):
1. Section 'General': Default Valuation Method RadioGroup (FIFO/WAC bound to `finance_settings.default_valuation_method`); Default Currency read-only display with `[ORG-CONFIG]` marker + link 'Manage Currencies' → `/finance/fx-rates`; Variance Calculation Enabled checkbox.
2. Section 'Standard Cost Policy': Critical Approval PIN Required checkbox bound to `finance_settings.critical_approval_pin_required`; Effective Date Policy Select (future-only / current-allowed / backdating-warn); Cost Basis Default Select; Cost Change Warning Threshold % Input (default 20, min 0, max 100) — fires V-FIN-STD-06 warn in MODAL-01.
3. Section 'Variance Display Thresholds': read-only info Alert citing P2 EPIC 10-O; thresholds On Track ≤5% / Warning 5–10% / Critical >10% as display chips.
4. Section 'Overhead Allocation': Default Allocation Basis Select (labor_hours/machine_hours/units); Default Overhead Rate % Input.
5. Section 'Fiscal Calendar': Calendar Type Select (Standard Gregorian / 4-4-5 / 4-5-4) with `[INDUSTRY-CONFIG]` marker; Fiscal Year Start Month Select; warning Alert on Calendar Type change ('affects period-end variance + budget P2').
6. Section 'D365 Integration': D365 Integration Enabled toggle gated by feature flag `integration.d365.finance_posting.enabled` (default OFF); Consolidation Cutoff Time TimePicker (default 23:00); Reconciliation Schedule read-only display.
7. Sticky Unsaved-Changes top bar (sticky top-0 z-50 bg-background/95 backdrop-blur) — renders when isDirty===true.
8. Footer: Save Settings (calls `updateFinanceSettings` Server Action from T-004) + Reset to Defaults (with confirmation modal).
9. Embedded link 'Manage Cost Centers' → `/finance/cost-centers` (T-006) and 'Lock Period (Phase 2)' Button gated disabled with tooltip 'Available in Phase 2'.
10. RBAC: visible to `fin.settings.write` holders for write, others read-only.

## Implementation contract
1. `app/finance/settings/page.tsx` — RSC fetches `finance_settings` via `getFinanceSettings()` server fn; passes to client.
2. `app/finance/settings/_components/settings-form.tsx` ('use client') — `useForm(zodResolver(finSettingsSchema))`; tracks `isDirty`; sticky save bar via shadcn Alert primitive in a sticky container.
3. Server Action `updateFinanceSettings(data)` already exists from T-004 — wire on submit.
4. Translations: hardcoded labels staged as `next-intl` placeholders `t('finance.settings.*')` — actual keys can be added in a later i18n task; for now, English literals match prototype text 1:1.

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/settings/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/settings/_components/settings-form.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/settings/_components/__tests__/settings-form.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/settings/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given the production page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/finance/other-screens.jsx:362-458, then it has the same 6 sections in the same order with the same controls — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist.
- Given user changes Default Valuation Method, when no Save yet, then sticky Unsaved-Changes Alert appears with Save/Discard.
- Given user without fin.settings.write, when page renders, then all inputs disabled and Save hidden.
- Given Calendar Type changed, when new value set, then warning Alert renders inline. AND given D365 Integration Enabled toggle is changed when feature flag integration.d365.finance_posting.enabled is OFF, then the toggle is disabled with tooltip 'Feature flag off'.
Note: UI closeout must include screenshot/artifact evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` (verified via test_strategy + checkpoint_policy.closeout_requires; previously a separate AC, hoisted to process layer by Fixer F13 2026-05-14).
_(AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: settings-form.test.tsx mounts the form with mocked initial values; asserts parity checklist items 1-9 via RTL queries + snapshot; asserts dirty-state behavior; asserts RBAC read-only mode.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/settings`.
- Playwright spec optional but artifacts captured per UI parity policy.

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate per shadcn primitives.
- Do not use HTML `<select>` instead of shadcn Select.
- Do not call `updateFinanceSettings` without the RBAC gate (Server Action already checks; UI gates Save button to avoid form submission attempts).
- Do not skip the feature-flag gate on D365 toggle (default OFF post Go-live per §12.8).
- Do not regress accessibility (axe violations = fail).
- Do not enable the Period Lock button in Phase 1 — keep disabled with tooltip per §8.4 FIN-020 P2.
